{{nihongo|'''Kamuheno Shrine'''|神部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kamuheno Shrine (Q135039697) | native_name = 神部神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kamuheno Shrine (Q135039697) | coordinates = {{coord|35.602781|138.466214}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kamuheno Shrine'''|神部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kamuheno Shrine'''|神部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kamuheno Shrine'''|神部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamuheno Shrine'''|神部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kamuheno Shrine'''|神部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kamuheno Shrine'''|神部神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kai Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
